hooks.command: node -e 'process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:"Read AGENTS.md, ANALYSIS_MEM.md, and ANALYSIS_SCRATCH.md before acting.",hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"Prefer editing source files in src/ and shared project files. Treat .cursor/, .kiro/, .codex/, and .agents/ as generated outputs."}}))'

node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const input=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,"utf8")||"{}");const cmd=input.tool_input&&input.tool_input.command?input.tool_input.command:"";if(/git\s+reset\s+--hard/.test(cmd)||/rm\s+-rf(\s|$)/.test(cmd)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Destructive Bash command blocked by Codex hook."}}));}'

node -e 'process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:"When changing IDE behavior, edit src/ or shared project files. Do not manually edit compiled .cursor/, .kiro/, .codex/, or .agents/ outputs."}}))'
